title: Redshift-independent cosmology with gravitational-wave luminosity distances and fast radio burst dispersion measures
bridge_note: GW luminosity distance ⊕ FRB dispersion measure → degeneracy reduction. Two independent observables improve identifiability by combining geometry and matter signals.
cosine_bridge: Independent signals (geometry ⊕ matter) align to reduce degeneracy → constraint tightens → signal > noise (45° 📐, cosθ ≥ 1/√(1²+1²)).
notes_internal: Clean example of orthogonal observables improving identifiability (geometry ⊕ matter).
